ksa_text: Skill in presenting data and AI strategy, risk, and value to board-level audiences, translating technical complexity into governance-appropriate language and decision frameworks.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the skill contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('board.level'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is strong (0.4563, top tier for this dataset); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
